nodes.label: Catálogo Data Structure
nodes.rationale: Global reusable item registry independent of projects; serves as source for LDMs and COTs. ID generated by app (8-char hex). Prices can be zero (labor or unknown). Items linked to COT/LDM by catalog_item_id.

nodes.label: Lista de Materiales (LDM) Data Structure
nodes.rationale: Per-project material lists sent to suppliers. Does not include sale prices. Legacy format LDM-{clave}-{MMDD}-{seq} coexists with current LDM-{clave}-{seq:02d}.

nodes.label: Cotización al Cliente (COT) Data Structure
nodes.rationale: Client-facing sales quotations with IVA. Quote number auto-generated as COT-{clave}-{G/P/E}{NN}-{YYYYMMDD}. Three types: General(G), Preliminar(P), Extraordinaria(E) with independent sequential counters.

nodes.label: CSV Import API Routes (Pending)
nodes.rationale: POST /api/import/catalogo, /api/import/ldm, /api/import/cotizacion are pending implementation. Current APIs support single-item add, search, and bulk-delete on catalog.

nodes.label: AutoCAD/LISP to App Workflow
nodes.rationale: LISP reads drawing, exports three CSV types (catalog, LDM, COT), app imports and assigns IDs, user reviews prices, generates PDFs for supplier and client.
